_comment: MCP servers archived as not useful for MoradBot. Reasons documented per server.

_reasons.puppeteer: DUPLICATE - firecrawl-mcp handles all web automation better
_reasons.browser-server: BLOCKED - requires OPENAI_API_KEY, conflicts with our OpenRouter setup
_reasons.filesystem: PLACEHOLDER - path '/path/to/allowed/files' never configured; Claude Code has native file access
_reasons.markitdown: BLOCKED - requires Docker; firecrawl-mcp handles document conversion better
_reasons.chrome-devtools: NO USE CASE - MoradBot is a backend API + widget, no Chrome DevTools needed in development
_reasons.imagesorcery-mcp: NO USE CASE - MoradBot has no image manipulation requirements
_reasons.DeepGraph Next.js MCP: NICHE - deep code graph for Next.js source; not needed for consuming Next.js
_reasons.DeepGraph React MCP: NICHE - deep code graph for React source; not needed for using React
_reasons.DeepGraph TypeScript MCP: NICHE - deep code graph for TypeScript source; not needed for writing TypeScript
